strategy: SPORTS SCIENCE + PERFORMANCE PSYCHOLOGY + ATHLETIC OPTIMIZATION
notes: SPORTS SCIENCE + PERFORMANCE PSYCHOLOGY + ATHLETIC OPTIMIZATION scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered. Key finding: Sports Psychology (25/25), Strength & Conditioning Science (25/25), and Sports Analytics (25/25) are all max-score niches — each backed by multi-million person communities and professional certification markets with zero dedicated streak apps. Sports Analytics has 13.8M community (NFL+NBA+soccer+MLB combined) and a rapidly growing front-office job market. S&C Science targets the $200M+ CSCS prep market. Sports Psychology serves every serious athlete, coach, and sports psych graduate student. The sports science category uniquely intersects professional certification prep (CSCS, ACSM, NATA, ISSN) with mass-market enthusiasm — pricing power is $5.99-$9.99/mo vs. $3.99 for general content categories.
